_comment:
Texts in English вҖ” tooltips (tip_*) and Conventions dialog (conv_*). Edit the text freely. The conv_*_explain and conv_intro texts accept simple HTML (

, , ). Do NOT rename the keys.
conv_intro:
These conventions affect some computed values (distance, rise/set times). Default values are optimized for EME

General astronomy software (e.g. mooncalc.org, Stellarium) often uses different conventions because it targets visual moon observation. For a radio link calculation, EME conventions are more accurate.
conv_dist_topo: Topocentric вҖ” observer вҶ’ Moon  (recommended for EME)
conv_dist_geo: Geocentric вҖ” Earth center вҶ’ Moon center
conv_dist_explain:
Topocentric: actual distance between your antenna and the Moon. This is the distance the radio signal travels.

Geocentric: distance from Earth's center (classical astronomical convention, used by mooncalc).

The difference can reach ~6,378 km (Earth radius) when Moon is at zenith. For EME, topocentric distance is essential as it determines path loss and signal delay.
conv_hor_geom: Geometric (0В°) вҖ” Moon center  (recommended for EME)
conv_hor_explain:
Geometric: the Moon is considered risen/set when its center crosses the geometric horizon (0В°). This is the reference for EME link budget вҖ” below 0В° the Moon is blocked by the Earth.

Visual: classical astronomical convention. The Moon is "risen" when its upper limb becomes visible to the observer (semi-diameter ~15' + atmospheric refraction ~34' = 0.83В° below geometric horizon). This is what mooncalc shows.

For EME, atmospheric refraction is negligible for radio signals (much less than optical), and the Moon's "limb" has no meaning for a radar echo. Geometric horizon is therefore the correct choice.
tip_save: Save callsign, locator, altitude and preferences.
tip_el_min:
MINIMUM ELEVATION вҖ” Usable horizon
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

Filters passes AND defines your MECHANICAL HORIZON.

If your dish is limited in low elevation
(obstacle: mast, building, mountвҖҰ), set EL min
to your threshold (e.g. 25В°):

  вҶ’ Only passes exceeding 25В° are shown
  вҶ’ Rise/set times are computed at the moment
    the Moon crosses 25В° (not 0В°)
  вҶ’ Displayed duration is your actual operation time

Leave at 0В° for standard astronomy.
tip_row_dblclick:
Click a pass row to see the detail
every 30 minutes (AZ, EL, Doppler, DGR, TSky...).
Click the NOW row to open the real-time dashboard
with all EME parameters.
tip_sked:
Online EME QSO planning tool
by SA5IKN вҖ” skeds, mutual visibility, etc.
tip_phase_chk:
Show lunar phase (visual only,
no effect on radio EME)
tip_local_time: Display in local time instead of UTC
tip_quality_filter:
Filter passes by minimum EME quality index
(0 to 8)
tip_duration:
Total pass duration above the horizon
Green вүҘ 5h, orange вүҘ 2h, red < 2h
tip_el_max:
MAXIMUM ELEVATION
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

Maximum height of the Moon in the sky
during this pass.

  Green  вүҘ 20В° : short atmospheric path, low loss
  Orange вүҘ 10В° : acceptable
  Red    < 10В° : high atmospheric loss,
                  high ground noise

At 10 GHz, atmospheric absorption increases
rapidly below 10В° elevation.
tip_el_max_time: Time when the Moon reaches maximum elevation
tip_decl:
LUNAR DECLINATION
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

Angle of the Moon relative to the celestial equatorial plane.

  Positive (+) = Moon north of the equator
  Negative (вҲ’) = Moon south of the equator

Affects the maximum height of the Moon:
  High decl. + northern latitude вҶ’ higher max EL
  Ranges from вҲ’28.6В° to +28.6В° over 18.6 years.
tip_distance:
EARTH-MOON DISTANCE (km)
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

Topocentric distance at maximum elevation.

  Perigee (min.) : ~356,500 km
  Apogee (max.)  : ~406,700 km
  Average         : ~384,400 km

Skyfield + JPL DE440s calculations (sub-km accuracy).
tip_extra_pl:
EXTRA PATH LOSS вҖ” Additional loss vs perigee
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

Extra PL = 40 Г— logвӮҒвӮҖ(d / 356,500)

  +0.0 dB = perigee (optimal)
  +5.8 dB = apogee (worst case)

Factor 40: round-trip path (dвҒҙ).
tip_total_pl:
TOTAL PATH LOSS вҖ” Complete EME attenuation
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

Total = PL perigee + Extra PL

Change frequency to recalculate.
tip_moon_sun:
MOON-SUN ANGLE
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

  180В° = opposition (no solar noise)
  0В°   = conjunction (max solar noise)

  > 15В° : no degradation
  5-15В° : possible S/N degradation
  < 5В°  : very difficult EME
tip_libration:
LIBRATION RATE (deg/h)
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

  < 0.10 deg/h : EXCELLENT
  0.10-0.25 : GOOD
  0.25-0.40 : MEDIUM
  > 0.40 : POOR

At 10 GHz, a high rate spreads the
reflected signal (Doppler spread).
At 144/432 MHz, the effect is negligible.
tip_doppler:
DOPPLER SPREAD EME (Hz)
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

Frequency spread of the reflected signal
due to libration.

  < 50 Hz  : excellent
  50-150 Hz : good
  > 150 Hz  : difficult
tip_spread_min:
SPREAD MIN вҖ” Best moment of the pass
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

Minimum Doppler spread value over the
entire pass duration, with the time at which
the minimum occurs (the 'magic window').

Spread can vary by a factor of 3Г— between
rise, culmination and set, depending on the
geometry of the day (Moon declination,
observer latitude).

  < 50 Hz  : excellent
  50-150 Hz : good
  > 150 Hz  : difficult

Sampled at 30 points across the pass.
tip_spread_max:
SPREAD MAX вҖ” Worst moment of the pass
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

Maximum Doppler spread value over the
entire pass duration, with the time.

Often at rise or set when diurnal libration
(due to Earth rotation) is strongest.

Sampled at 30 points across the pass.
tip_quality:
EME QUALITY INDEX (0 to 10)
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

  Max elevation (30%/20%)
  Duration (25%/10%)
  Path loss (25%)
  Moon-Sun (20%/15%)
  Libration (0%/30% if вүҘ 1 GHz)

Score adapts to frequency:
  < 1 GHz : libration ignored
  вүҘ 1 GHz : libration = 30% of score
